title: Kat's Create UI
description: A stylized Create UI pack with mod support!
body:
# A stylized Create UI pack. Perfect for a Create playthrough!

## So far I've added:

- Inventory (survival)
- Crafting Table
- Dispenser
- Hopper
- Smithing Table
- Chest (single and double)
- Shulker Boxes (all colors)
- Widget (buttons etc.)

## And I'm going to add:

- All Vanilla GUIs
- Sophisticated Backpacks GUIs
- Apotheosis GUIs
- Xaero's Minimap & Worldmap retexture
- Cadmus Cliam Map retexture
- Possibly more mods!

### Contact me on Discord at _eeebsiekat_!
